hero.name: Michael Dittmann
hero.subtitle: Guitar Making
hero.statement: Handcrafted concert guitars from selected tonewoods

philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.p1: Each guitar is born from the conviction that an instrument is more than the sum of its parts. It is a resonating body that breathes — shaped by wood, craftsmanship, and time.
philosophy.p2: My goal is to create instruments that don't just sound — they move. In every step of the building process, years of experience, care, and a deep love for sound come together.
philosophy.p3: Selecting the tonewoods is the first and perhaps most important step. Each wood carries its own character, its own story — and deserves to be heard.

about.title: About
about.p1: My fascination for the classical guitar began during my time in Asturias in northern Spain, where I worked on a sanctuary for donkeys.
about.p2: The sound of a good guitar touches me to this day and leads me back to this place again and again. In guitar making, I have found my own access to it.
about.p3: After initial instruments created out of curiosity, my path led me to Michael Wichmann. Since then, I have been working and learning in his workshop, developing my own tonal signature in guitar making there.

tonewood.title: Tonewoods
tonewood.text: Carefully selected and aged over years, the finest woods form the foundation of every guitar. Spruce, cedar, rosewood, and other fine woods are chosen for their tonal quality and character.

structure.title: Construction
structure.text: The bracing and internal structure of each soundboard is individually tuned. This creates an instrument that sounds balanced and clear across all registers — with depth and projection.

sound.title: Playability
sound.text:
To make a guitar a harmonious instrument, I tune all components so the sound can unfold freely.

The central focus is individual adjustment to the player's needs and ease of playability.

guitar1.name: Concert Guitar
guitar1.description:
Top: Spruce
Back & Sides: Birdseye Maple
Scale: 640 mm
Nut: 52 mm
Design and bracing after Torres FE19
French polish (shellac)

guitar2.name: Concert Guitar II
guitar2.description: Cedar top with maple body. An instrument with a velvety touch and surprising projection. Ideal for players seeking warmth and clarity.

guitar3.name: Concert Guitar III
guitar3.description: Spruce top with Ziricote. Extraordinary in sound and appearance. An instrument of character — powerful, nuanced, and of rare beauty.

experience.title: Experience
experience.text: My available instruments can be tried at leisure by appointment at Michael Wichmann's shop in Hamburg or in 19294 Malliß.

custom.title: Custom Build
custom.p1: I also build guitars individually tailored to you.
custom.p2: In a conversation — by phone or in person — we discuss your preferences and the various possibilities.
custom.p3: After the decision, the selection of woods follows.
custom.p4: Currently, the build time is approximately three months.
custom.p5: My work is accompanied by Michael Wichmann, with half a century of experience in guitar making.

contact.title: Getting to Know
contact.text: Whether an existing instrument or a new guitar: Write to me or give me a call. I look forward to the exchange.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: I look forward to hearing from you
contact.name: Your name

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.name: Michael Dittmann
impressum.responsibility: Responsible for content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV
impressum.disputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (OS): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

overview.title: 1. Privacy at a Glance
overview.text: The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website.

collection.title: 2. Data Collection on this Website
collection.text: Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. You can find their contact details in the legal notice of this website.

contactForm.title: 3. Contact Form
contactForm.text: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the inquiry form, including the contact data you provided, will be stored by us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We do not share this data without your consent.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies
cookies.text: This website does not use cookies for tracking or analytics purposes. Only technically necessary cookies are used that are required for the operation of the site.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.text: You have the right at any time to free information about your stored personal data, its origin and recipients, and the purpose of data processing, as well as a right to correction, blocking, or deletion of this data.
